projectDescription: An interactive React fundamentals learning app that demonstrates core concepts — JSX, hooks, props, global state, and browser APIs — through hands-on, runnable examples built with Vite and Tailwind CSS.
keyFeatures: Interactive demos for every React fundamental concept
useState counter with increment, decrement, and reset
useEffect for side effects and API data fetching
Custom useFetch hook for reusable async fetch logic
Props and parent-to-child data passing example
Zustand global state store with shared state across components
Conditional rendering and list rendering patterns
React Router v7 with nested routes and active link highlighting
Tailwind CSS v4 styling with responsive sidebar layout
publicApiSurface: useFetch() — custom hook returning an async fetchDataBackend(url) function
storeGalleta — Zustand store with detalle state and setGalleta(newGalleta) action
Primero — JSX, variables, fragments, conditionals, events
Tercero — useEffect with API fetch on dependency change
Cuarto — custom hook usage with external APIs
Septimo / Octavo — Zustand global state parent/child
Noveno — Conditional rendering and list rendering
